channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Bed headboard, 14th June
item.description:
Bed headboard Outside 80 Carlton road Northumberland heath This wàs put there by resident of number 80 Carlton road been about 3 weeks
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Carlton Road, Northumberland Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Cars pavement parking, 14th June
item.description:
Sunday worship in another Road is causing pavement parking from around 6pm until 12pm there are cars along Forester Road pavement parked very close to houses on my side of the Road. This Road is very narrow and single lane traffic. The pavement is also very narrow and causes obstruction on entering and exiting the house. It also makes it difficult to get a bicycle in or out of the house. Although this is not every Sunday it is still inconvenient when it does happen. It has been happening for around 5 years

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Forester Road, Nunhead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Parking in front of bus stop, 14th June
item.description:
This car was stopped in front of the HOOP LANE (stop A) in Golders Green road, for about 5 minutes. This is not the first time this happens and actually made me miss my bus as it didn’t stop.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 128, Golders Green Road, Golders Green, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped black bags opposite 93 elderfield rd, e5, 14th June
item.description:
I reported on Saturday 13 June 2026 a dumped bath and black bags opposite 93 Elderfield Rd, E5. Only the bath was removed but NOT the black bags. Can the crew please remove the black bags. Thank you
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Elderfield Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping outside garvey & cann house, southwold rd, 14th June
item.description:
Flytipping outside Garvey & Cann House, Southwold Rd
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Casimir Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.description:
Give Way sign rotated 45° from oncoming traffic in Oakwood Avenue at the jct with Scotts Lane, Shortlands
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Oakwood Avenue, Shortlands, Greater London

item.title: Give Way sign light on in bright daytime sunshine - Beckenham Grove jct with Scotts Lane, Shortlands., 14th June
item.description:
Give Way sign light on in bright daytime sunshine - Beckenham Grove jct with Scotts Lane, Shortlands.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Beckenham Grove, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Kimberly Road Park Open Space, 14th June
item.description:
Multiple large wooden children's pegs are broken and have become detached and are now laying around the park. Others are lose and will also be rolling around soon. All of the equipment needs to be safety checked, I am reporting so there is a record that you have been alerted to the dangers in this play area. Someone else has already reported the swing.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kimberley Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped bags next to bus stop near barberhood shop, southwold rd, e5, 14th June
item.description:
Dumped bags next to bus stop near Barber Hood Barber Shop on Southwold Rd, E5
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Dennington Close, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping, 14th June
item.description:
More stuff dumped

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Fassett Square, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Loose rattling drain cover, 14th June
item.description:
There is a loose rattling drain cover on Dartford road causing broken sleep as makes a noise every time driven over
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree growth is blocking the pavement, 14th June
item.description:
The growth of suckers from the base and trunk is so large now that it is blocking the pavement. Anyone with a pram or in a wheelchair would struggle to get by. Also a chance that they would scratch any cars that park next to this tree. Can this growth be cut back please. This tree is on the pavement on Ryedale, opposite 55 Ryedale. Just after the junction with Cornflower Terrace.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 55, Ryedale, Nunhead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped bags nearby 17a southwold road, 14th June
item.description:
Flytipping next to lamp post near to 17A Southwold Road, E5
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Dennington Close, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Report 4: Burnhill Rd jct with Kelsey Square, Beckenham - the white road markings of 'NO ENTRY' and the double dashed lobes are faded and partly missing. Please re-mark them., 14th June
item.description:
Report 4: Burnhill Rd jct with Kelsey Square, Beckenham - the white road markings of 'NO ENTRY' and the double dashed lobes are faded and partly missing. Please re-mark them. Again, the problem is because the tarmac road surface was replaced by fancy bricks in the c.2018 £4.4m Beckenham Town so-called Improvement Scheme. I warned the Council that road markings do not adhere and last on paving bricks and mortar between them. Bromley Council went ahead with the consultant's whims to brick pave the carriageway. Now the road markings get quickly damaged and keeping them visible and lawful will be a continual expense to Bromley Council Tax payers.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Kelsey Square, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Report 3: Burnhill Rd jct with High St Beckenham - the double yellow lines on both corners are 50% worn away. Please re-mark them., 14th June
item.description:
Report 3: Burnhill Rd jct with High St Beckenham - the double yellow lines on both corners are 50% worn away. Please re-mark them. The problem is because the tarmac road surface was replaced by fancy bricks in the c.2018 £4.4m Beckenham Town so-called Improvement Scheme. I warned the Council that road markings do not adhere and last on paving bricks and mortar between them. Bromley Council went ahead with the consultant's whims to brick pave the carriageway. Now the road markings get quickly damaged and keeping them visible and lawful will be a continual expense to Bromley Council Tax payers.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Kelsey Square, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Osborn Terrace, Blackheath

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Thomas Road, North End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Neighbour flytipping several items, 14th June
item.description:
Witness my downstairs neighbour taking a garden glass round table top with white metal legs & a black plastic bag full of rubbish down Greenvale Road SE91PB towards the co-op supermarket at 10.25 pm Sunday night 14th June. This is not the first time I have witnessed this through my window.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Elizabeth Terrace, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.description:
Lamp column under flyover not working

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Harrow Manorway, West Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Report 2: Mandatory Turn Left round blue arrow sign has been rotated 90° opposite Kelsey Square nr jct Burnhill Rd (no entry) Beckenham., 14th June
item.description:
Report 2: Mandatory Turn Left round blue arrow sign has been rotated 90° opposite Kelsey Square nr jct Burnhill Rd (no entry) Beckenham. This sign is meant to be facing Kelsey Square to indicate 'Turn Left' into Beckenham High St and not to turn right into the no entry Burnhill Rd.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Burnhill Road, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
